candidates.why: Most specific top-line revenue label; equals Total revenue in the preview and is the preferred reported revenue line.
Also a valid revenue line, but appears to be a duplicate total of the more specific revenue label.

variables.notes: Priority list for revenue across years; use the more specific revenue line first, then Total revenue as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Personnel expenses in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: A component of COGS, not the full reported COGS.
A component of COGS, not the full reported COGS.
Explicit full COGS line; matches the target directly.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortization in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: A component of COGS, not the full reported COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total direct cost line rather than individual components.

candidates.row_label: Personnel expenses in Cost of goods sold
candidates.why: Not SG&A; this is a COGS component and should be excluded.
Core SG&A overhead bucket; explicit populated operating expense line.
A component of Selling expenses, but subtotal row exists and is preferable alone for coverage.
A component of Selling expenses, but subtotal row exists and is preferable alone for coverage.
Core SG&A overhead bucket; explicit populated operating expense line.
A component of Administrative expenses, but subtotal row exists and is preferable alone for coverage.
A component of Administrative expenses, but subtotal row exists and is preferable alone for coverage.
Additional overhead/operating expense bucket that is separate from selling and administrative expenses.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A row exists. Selected the main overhead buckets and excluded COGS and D&A component lines. Chose subtotal component buckets rather than their detailed subcomponents.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset line, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset line, not income statement R&D expense.

variables.notes: No clear income statement R&D expense line is present. Supplemental amortization and balance sheet capitalized R&D asset lines are not valid XRD expense mappings.

candidates.why: Broader finance-cost line; useful fallback when specific interest expense is not reported/populated.
Most direct match to interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest component only, not total interest expense.
Finance-cost component, but less direct than interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure only.
Balance sheet accrual, not period interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list: use specific Interest Expenses when available; otherwise use broader Financial expenses as fallback for years like 2025 where only that line is populated.

candidates.why: Valid equity line, but includes non-controlling interests and would double count if MIB is also used.
Not book equity; this is the balance sheet total.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Used a row outside the candidate list because the candidates miss the correct owner/parent equity concept. This line excludes non-controlling interests and is preferable to TOTAL EQUITY to avoid double counting with MIB. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority interest stock.
Direct match for minority interest / non-controlling interests on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet non-controlling interests line to pair with parent-only book equity.
